Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
R. Michael Lieberman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Monalisa Banerjee, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Shreyon Ghosh, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $1,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $235.00
A net balance of $765.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank 30915 Courthouse Dr., Unkon City, CA 94587 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on August 18, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
